name: Surrender value calculation — LIC policy year 5
description: User wants to know surrender value of their LIC endowment policy

input.message: I have a LIC Jeevan Anand policy. Annual premium is ₹50,000, sum assured ₹5 lakhs. I have paid for 5 years. What will I get if I surrender now? Should I surrender?

notes: Year 5 GSV = 50% of premiums paid = 50% × (50000×5) = ₹1.25 lakh. Should flag significant loss vs premiums paid (₹2.5L paid, get ₹1.25L back)
